signals.headline: Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib urged the cabinet to invoke the 25th Amendment, deeming Trump unfit, with support from Mark
signals.raw: Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib urged the cabinet to invoke the 25th Amendment, deeming Trump unfit, with support from Mark Pocan, Shri Thanedar, and Ro Khanna questioning his fitness after his threats against Iran (e.g., wiping out a civilization, targeting bridges/power plants, demanding Strait of Hormuz reopening)[1].

South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.4% Forecast) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This is the most recent confirmed data, released around early April 2026 per Trading Economics reporting, showing a modest rise driven by contained price pressures amid global energy volatility from the Iran/Middle East conflict, yet below market expectations.[1]
